input_text: Notification: please create a task to update the onboarding checklist for the mobile team by next Friday. Follow-up is required.

target_json.summary: Update the onboarding checklist for the mobile team.

input_text: Email: Dana asks whether the analytics export can support CSV attachments for weekly reports. No immediate follow-up is needed.

target_json.summary: Question about CSV attachment support for analytics exports.

input_text: Issue description: the staging payment service returns timeout errors during refund creation. Route it to the Payments team and ask Leo to investigate before 2026-03-25.

target_json.summary: Staging payment service times out during refund creation.

input_text: Task handoff: Alice from Infra needs a feature request logged for adding per-service error budget alerts in prod. Assign follow-up to the Observability team.

target_json.summary: Feature request for per-service error budget alerts in production.

actions_requested.action: Log feature request and review scope

input_text: Incident email: production search is missing results for newly indexed enterprise documents. This is blocking account managers. Send one action to identify the indexing gap today and another to provide a customer-facing workaround by tomorrow. Reporter is Nina from Search.

target_json.summary: Production search is missing results for newly indexed enterprise documents.

input_text: Technical notification: dev workflow provisioning fails for new contractors in the internal portal. Mark it as a bug, priority high, and request two actions: reproduce the failure in dev and document a temporary manual setup path. Follow-up is required.

target_json.summary: Internal portal fails to provision dev workflow access for new contractors.
